# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
  - name: google-cloudapis/cloudsql
    version: '3.17.0'

params:
  project_id: your-project-id
  region: us-central1
  instance_name: staging-db
  db_user: root
  root_password: CloudSQL2024!
  network: default
  authorizedNetworks:
    - 0.0.0.0/0

properties:
  datasource:
    username: ${params.db_user}
    password: ${params.root_password}
    databaseUrl: "postgresql://${params.db_user}:${params.root_password}@${params.instance_name}.ci-europe-west1.cloudsql.google.com:3306/your_database_name"

 outputs:
   connectionString: ${properties.datasource.databaseUrl}
